title: Workflow Assistant
brief_text: Need a workflow assistant that helps teams stay organized. Goals: reduce follow-up work and improve visibility. Timeline is this quarter and budget is approved.

title: Enterprise Data Workspace
brief_text: Enterprise customers need a workspace for reviewing customer data and approvals. We know this starts on web and should be in pilot in six weeks, but the controls for sensitive data are still undecided.

title: Founder Community Tool
brief_text: Build a community tool for creators. Goals: help them track members and coordinate content drops. Start with web. Success means fewer manual handoffs, but budget and timeline are still unknown.

title: External Support Product
brief_text: This is a B2C support product for busy parents who need fast answers. Goal is to reduce support wait time and keep conversations organized. The commercial model and first platform are both unresolved.

title: Minimal Enterprise Console
brief_text: We need a minimal prototype for enterprise admins in two weeks. It also has to include SSO, audit logs, permissions, and compliance reporting. Team is 2 engineers and the budget is tight.

title: Multiplatform Rush MVP
brief_text: Need a simple MVP in 10 days on a lean budget. Team is just me plus one contractor. It has to ship on web and mobile with Salesforce, Stripe, Slack, analytics, admin, and billing from day one.
